summary: The user is training for another marathon and seeks advice on improving their running pace after completing their first marathon six months after turning 30. They aim to reduce their finish time from 4 hours 15 minutes by at least 15 minutes and plan to incorporate strength training and stretching into their routine for better performance and recovery.
facts: The user completed their first marathon six months after turning 30. The user's current marathon finish time is around 4 hours 15 minutes. The user hopes to shave off at least 15 minutes from their finish time for their next marathon. The user plans to incorporate strength training into their training routine. The user has been inconsistent with stretching after runs but intends to make it a priority. The user will schedule stretching into their daily planner as a non-negotiable part of their post-run routine. The user plans to find a stretching buddy to help keep them motivated. The user will track their stretching progress in their running log. The user is interested in fueling their body for optimal performance during marathon training.
